channel.title: doyouknow.app - English
channel.description: Surprising facts about UAE, Saudi Arabia, and the world.

item.title: Opening a Bank Account in Egypt: Guide
item.description: How foreign residents can open a bank account in Egypt: required documents, choosing a bank, account types, and practical tips for expats and long-term visitors.

item.title: Egypt Driving Guide: Rentals & Road Rules
item.description: Should you rent a car in Egypt? Car rental requirements, an International Driving Permit, road conditions, and why most visitors use drivers instead in 2026.

item.title: Nile Cruise Guide: Luxor to Aswan Trip Planning
item.description: How to plan a Nile cruise between Luxor and Aswan: cruise length options, what's included, choosing a ship, temple stops, and practical booking tips for 2026.

item.title: Cairo International Airport Guide
item.description: Navigating Cairo International Airport (CAI): terminals, visa on arrival, getting into the city, SIM cards, and practical tips for a smooth arrival in 2026.

item.title: Egypt Safety Guide for Travelers
item.description: Practical safety information for visiting Egypt in 2026: general crime, road safety, common tourist scams, health precautions, and staying informed while traveling.

item.title: Egypt Tipping & Baksheesh Guide
item.description: Understanding tipping in Egypt: what baksheesh means, typical amounts for restaurants, hotels, guides, and drivers, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Egypt Money & Currency Guide: ATMs & Cash
item.description: Managing money in Egypt: the Egyptian pound, ATM access, card acceptance, currency exchange, and practical budgeting tips for travelers in 2026.

item.title: Egypt SIM Card & Mobile Guide for Visitors
item.description: How to get a SIM card in Egypt: airport kiosks vs city shops, major carriers, tourist data plans, required documents, and practical tips for 2026.

item.title: Getting Around Egypt: Trains, Flights & Buses
item.description: How to travel between Egyptian cities: domestic flights, the Cairo–Luxor–Aswan train line, intercity buses, and how to choose the right option for 2026.

item.title: Best Time to Visit Egypt: Season Guide
item.description: When is the best time to visit Egypt? A season-by-season breakdown of weather in Cairo, the Nile Valley, and the Red Sea coast, plus peak season and crowd tips.

item.title: Egypt Tourist Visa Guide: All Entry Options
item.description: A complete overview of Egypt's tourist visa options in 2026: e-Visa, visa on arrival, embassy visas, and how to know which route applies to your nationality.

item.title: Egyptian Traditional Crafts: A Living Heritage
item.description: A guide to Egyptian traditional crafts: khayamiya tentmaking, copper and brasswork, alabaster carving, weaving, and where to see artisans working today.

item.title: Coptic Heritage in Egypt: History & Community
item.description: An introduction to Coptic Christianity in Egypt: its origins, Old Cairo's churches and monasteries, the Coptic calendar, and the community's living traditions today.

item.title: Egyptian Music Culture: History & Genres
item.description: An overview of Egyptian music: Umm Kulthum and the golden age of Arab music, classical Egyptian instruments, shaabi, and the modern mahraganat scene.

item.title: Islamic Cairo: A Guide to the Medieval Quarter
item.description: A guide to Islamic Cairo: al-Muizz Street, the Citadel, Khan el-Khalili bazaar, key mosques and madrasas, and practical tips for exploring in 2026.

item.title: Egypt's Western Desert: Oases & Dunes Guide
item.description: An overview of Egypt's Western Desert: the five major oases, the Great Sand Sea, planning a multi-day desert circuit, and practical safety tips for 2026.

item.title: Egyptian Cuisine Guide: Dishes & Where to Eat
item.description: A guide to Egyptian cuisine: koshari, ful medames, molokhia, street food staples, regional specialties, and where to find authentic food in 2026.

item.title: Koshari: Egypt's National Dish Explained
item.description: What is koshari? The history, ingredients, and regional variations of Egypt's beloved layered rice, lentil, and pasta dish, plus where to try it in 2026.

item.title: The History and Meaning of the Mona Lisa
item.description: Why is a small 500-year-old portrait the most famous painting in the world? The real history, mystery, and meaning behind Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa.

item.title: The History of Board Games Throughout Human History
item.description: From ancient Egyptian Senet to modern strategy games, here's how board games evolved across roughly 5,000 years of continuous human civilization.
